LoginPage.description: Manage demo subscriptions, checkout sessions and customer billing flows without touching real money. Everything here is wired for Stripe test mode.
LoginPage.disclaimer: Use your sandbox account credentials. Payments and subscriptions are test-mode only.
features: Test customer sessions and subscription states before connecting real billing.
Keep authentication, API cookies and billing actions in one small SaaS surface.
Designed as a practical playground for Stripe Checkout and customer portal flows.
LoginPage.title: Sign in to your SaaS billing cockpit

LoginForm.description: Enter your account details to open the sandbox dashboard.
LoginForm.error: We could not sign you in. Please check your credentials and try again.
LoginForm.footer: This project talks to your backend and Stripe test mode, so no real charges are created.
LoginForm.title: Welcome back

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must contain at most 64 characters
validation.passwordWeak: Password must contain letters, numbers and special characters
